2309710.name: GameGuru MAX - Lake Town
2309710.description:
Welcome to the Lake Town

The Lake Town Booster Pack contains 365 assets from artist EyeFly, enabling you to create your own fantasy or medieval shore front. Designed around the theme of a wooden timbered fishing town, you'll find a ton of assets; pre-fabricated buildings, more than 180 individual building parts, walls, stairs, roofs, window shutters and doors - allowing you to create your own buildings of almost any size.

In addition to the amazing building assets, you'll find matching wooden furniture and fishing gear including beds, tables, chairs, stools, fire pits, nets and boats, along with a selection of lanterns and torches to light your way.

The Lake Town pack also contains 10 unique vendor signs, each with 3 variants, and sign posts to hang them from.

For that final touch, all doors and stairs are compatible with the Building Editor, enabling you to create yet more buildings.

What's in the pack?[/b]

186 x building assets
114 x Scenic items and furniture
33 x Vendor signs and sign posts
13 x Torches and coal effects
10 x Prefabricated buildings
9 x Dock pieces

英语*
*具有完全音频支持的语言
